reasoning: Donald Trump will be the sitting US President in 2025. No US President has ever divorced while in office, and the extreme political costs and intense scrutiny strongly disincentivize such a move. The couple has remained married for nearly 20 years, surviving numerous major scandals (e.g., Stormy Daniels, E. Jean Carroll) and intense legal/public pressure. Melania reportedly renegotiated her prenuptial agreement in 2023 ahead of the 2024 campaign, likely securing financial clarity for herself and their son Barron in exchange for maintaining the marriage through his potential term. While Barron is now 18 (often a catalyst for empty-nester divorces), the combination of the presidency, a freshly updated prenup, and a base rate of divorce for this age demographic of <1% makes a 2025 divorce announcement highly improbable.
